title: BEM-912 proof policy retry
objective:
Run script:
"""
for p in ['governance/proof','governance/tools','governance/reports','governance/runtime/curator_dispatch','.github/workflows']:
    Path(p).mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

policy = {
  'status':'active',
  'name':'external_proof_policy',
  'rule':'PASS must have at least one independent proof class beyond self-declared markdown',
  'accepted_proof_classes':['git_commit_sha','github_actions_run_log','deterministic_tool_stdout','curator_mailbox_with_validation','external_auditor_result'],
  'current_gap':'codex-status may return commit_sha null; therefore CI workflow and deterministic stdout are required until SHA capture is fixed',
  'minimum_for_future_pass':['deterministic_tool_stdout','proof_file','changed_artifact_path'],
  'minimum_for_release_pass':['git_commit_sha_or_actions_run_log','deterministic_tool_stdout','external_audit_if_requested'],
  'owner':'OBJ-DIR-001'
}
Path('governance/state/external_proof_policy.json').write_text(json.dumps(policy, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

ci_workflow = 'name: Governance Validation CI

on:
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  governance-validation:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'
      - name: Print commit SHA
        run: |
          git rev-parse HEAD
          git status --short
      - name: Validate registries
        run: python governance/tools/validate_registries.py
      - name: Validate workspace promotion
        run: python governance/tools/validate_workspace_promotion.py
      - name: Validate product repository registry
        run: python governance/tools/validate_product_repository_registry.py
      - name: Run baseline selftest
        run: python governance/tools/run_bem880_selftest.py
      - name: Run dispatch E2E selftest
        run: python governance/tools/run_dispatch_e2e_selftest.py
      - name: Check policy gate
        run: python governance/tools/evaluate_policy_gate.py
      - name: Check repository health
        run: python governance/tools/update_repository_health_dashboard.py
'
Path('.github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml').write_text(ci_workflow, encoding='utf-8')

collector = '#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
mkdir -p governance/proof
SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD)
STATUS=$(git status --short | sed ':a;N;$!ba;s/\n/\\n/g')
printf '{\n  "status": "PASS",\n  "commit_sha": "%s",\n  "git_status": "%s"\n}\n' "$SHA" "$STATUS" > governance/proof/git_proof_last_run.json
cat governance/proof/git_proof_last_run.json
'
Path('governance/tools/collect_git_proof.sh').write_text(collector, encoding='utf-8')

required_tools = ['governance/tools/validate_registries.py','governance/tools/run_bem880_selftest.py','governance/tools/run_dispatch_e2e_selftest.py','governance/tools/evaluate_policy_gate.py','governance/tools/update_repository_health_dashboard.py','governance/tools/collect_git_proof.sh']
required_proofs = ['governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM889_REPOSITORY_READY.md','governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM899_AUTONOMOUS_SENDING_CONTOUR_READY.md','governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM911_ARCH_EVENTLOG_PASS.md']
missing = [p for p in required_tools + required_proofs if not Path(p).exists()]
status = 'PASS_WITH_SHA_GAP' if not missing else 'FAIL'
summary = {'status':status,'missing':missing,'policy':'governance/state/external_proof_policy.json','ci_workflow':'.github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml','collector':'governance/tools/collect_git_proof.sh','honest_gap':'Deno codex-status remains commit_sha null in observed runs; release proof requires Actions run log or git collector output'}
Path('governance/proof/BEM912_PROOF_POLICY_SUMMARY.json').write_text(json.dumps(summary, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
Path('governance/reports/BEM912_PROOF_POLICY_CI.md').write_text('# BEM-912 External proof policy and CI

Status: ' + status + '

Policy: governance/state/external_proof_policy.json

CI workflow: .github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml

Git proof collector: governance/tools/collect_git_proof.sh

Missing: ' + (', '.join(missing) if missing else 'none') + '

Honest gap: current Deno codex-status still reports commit_sha=null; release PASS requires git SHA or Actions run log.
', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM912_PROOF_POLICY_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-912 proof policy proof
Status: ' + status + '
Missing: ' + (', '.join(missing) if missing else 'none') + '
Honest gap: commit_sha capture still external to this run.
', encoding='utf-8')
ev = Path('governance/logs/event_log.jsonl')
existing = ev.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if ev.exists() else ''
ev.write_text(existing + json.dumps({'event':'bem912_external_proof_policy_created','status':status,'ci_workflow':'.github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml','gap':'commit_sha null until CI/git proof capture'}, ensure_ascii=False) + '
', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/external_proof_policy.json','.github/workflows/governance-validation-ci.yml','governance/tools/collect_git_proof.sh','governance/proof/BEM912_PROOF_POLICY_SUMMARY.json','governance/reports/BEM912_PROOF_POLICY_CI.md',str(marker),'governance/logs/event_log.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('BEM912 proof policy ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
